# Enforce use of wrapped setup helpers that use ember-window-mock (`cardstack-host/wrapped-setup-helpers-only`)

💼 This rule is enabled in the ✅ `recommended` config.

<!-- end auto-generated rule header -->

Do not import `setupApplicationTest` or `setupRenderingTest` directly from `ember-qunit`. Use the host application's wrapped setup helpers that use `ember-window-mock` instead.
